# CWE-838: Inappropriate Encoding for Output Context (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-838-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type Notice struct {
	Title string `json:"title"`
	Body  string `json:"body"`
}

// Safe: response encoding matches the declared UTF-8 JSON content type.
// json.Encoder emits valid UTF-8 for all string fields in the payload.
func PublishNotice(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	notice := Notice{Title: "Alert", Body: "update"}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json; charset=utf-8")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(notice)
}
